  let P5 (d : Digit) := 5 ∣ to_nat_digit d
  let A := S.filter (fun d => ¬ P2 d)
  let B := S.filter (fun d => ¬ P5 d)
  have hA : A.card = 5 := by decide
  have hB : B.card = 8 := by decide
  have hAB : (A ∩ B).card = 4 := by decide
  have h_card : good_seqs.toFinset.card = 9 ^ n + 4 ^ n - 8 ^ n - 5 ^ n := by
    rw [show good_seqs.toFinset = S.pi (fun _ => S) \ ((S.pi (fun _ => A)) ∪ (S.pi (fun _ => B))) by
      ext s; simp [good_seqs, is_good_seq, to_nat_digit, P2, P5, A, B]
      simp [Nat.dvd_and_iff (Nat.coprime_of_dvd' (by decide))]; push_neg; rfl]
    rw [Finset.card_sdiff (Finset.subset_univ _), Finset.card_union, Finset.card_pi_finset,
        Finset.card_pi_finset, ← Finset.inter_pi, Finset.card_pi_finset, Finset.card_univ, 
        Fintype.card_fin, hA, hB, hAB]
    have aux : ∀ k, k ≤ n → 5 ^ k + 8 ^ k ≤ 9 ^ k + 4 ^ k := by
      intro k hk; induction k with | zero => rfl | succ k ih =>
      rw [pow_succ, pow_succ, pow_succ, pow_succ]
      linarith [Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_left (Nat.le_succ 4) k, Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_left (Nat.le_succ 8) k]
    rw [Nat.add_comm (5^n), Nat.add_sub_assoc (Nat.pow_le_pow_left (by norm_num) n),
        Nat.sub_sub, Nat.sub_add_eq_add_sub (aux n (le_refl n)), Nat.add_comm (4^n),
        Nat.add_sub_assoc (Nat.pow_le_pow_left (by norm_num) n), Nat.sub_sub]
  rw [h_card]
  simp only [ENNReal.sub_div (by simp) (by simp), ENNReal.add_div, ENNReal.div_self (by simp) (by simp)]
  ring
